summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Project Atlas after WeasyPrint library fix. Backend health check passes, both customer and admin login flows working perfectly in browser. All core banking features functional. Professional UI (white background, red accent buttons) confirmed. Mobile responsive elements present. 88.2% backend API success rate, 100% frontend critical features working.

non_critical_bugs.impact: Notification bell may not display notifications, but doesn't block core functionality
non_critical_bugs.details: Backend logs show repeated 500 errors for notifications endpoint. Other features working normally.

expected_behaviors.reason: Expected behavior - beneficiary was already added in previous test runs

passed_tests: Demo credentials displayed on login page
No visible error messages on pages
Card details visible on customer dashboard

action_item_for_main_agent.notifications_endpoint: Fix /api/v1/notifications endpoint returning 500 error. Check notification service implementation and database queries. Non-critical but should be resolved for complete functionality.
action_item_for_main_agent.verification_needed: Verify notification bell functionality in UI after backend fix.
